en_title: Netflix Horror Game Starring Sadie Sink and Zoë Kravitz from Oxenfree Developer Night School Studio
cn_title: Netflix恐怖游戏《Unhinged》公布，由《Oxenfree》开发商打造
subtitle: 手机里的致命惊魂
opus_summary: Netflix即将推出第一人称恐怖游戏《Unhinged》，由《Oxenfree》开发商Night School Studio打造。玩家在游戏中通过手机操控。

paragraphs.en: Netflix is dipping its toe back into narrative adventure with the upcoming launch of Unhinged , a first-person horror game from Oxenfree developer Night School Studio.
paragraphs.cn: Netflix再次涉足叙事冒险领域，即将推出《Unhinged》，这是一款由《Oxenfree》开发商Night School Studio打造的第一人称恐怖游戏。

paragraphs.en: Unlike the teen drama of Oxenfree, Unhinged looks to be a more mature, blood-spattered affair. The game's story centers on two young women in neighbouring houses, as one attempts to escape a home invasion.
paragraphs.cn: 与《Oxenfree》的青少年戏剧风格不同，《Unhinged》看起来更成熟，充满血腥。游戏故事围绕住在相邻房屋的两名年轻女子展开，其中一人试图逃离一场入室袭击。

paragraphs.en: Unhinged also features bonafide acting talent, in the shape of Stranger Things and Spider-Man: Brand New Day star Sadie Sink, plus The Batman and Divergent's Zoë Kravitz. Video game veteran Troy Baker rounds out the cast list, meanwhile.
paragraphs.cn: 《Unhinged》还请来了真正的演员阵容，包括《怪奇物语》和《蜘蛛侠：崭新一日》的主演Sadie Sink，以及《蝙蝠侠》和《分歧者》中的Zoë Kravitz。同时，游戏界老兵Troy Baker也加入了演出阵容。

paragraphs.en: Rather than Netflix's previous experiments with interactive live-action experiences (such as in Black Mirror's Bandersnatch), this is very much a video game that you control with your phone, streamed to your TV via the Netflix platform.
paragraphs.cn: 与Netflix之前对互动真人体验的尝试（例如《黑镜：潘达斯奈基》）不同，这完全是一款电子游戏，你通过手机操控，并通过Netflix平台串流到电视上。

paragraphs.en: Gameplay makes use of your phone to receive phone calls and text messages, or to look around its world with a virtual flashlight. As you'd expect, the story features multiple avenues to explore — and yes, you can die.
paragraphs.cn: 游戏玩法利用你的手机来接听电话、接收短信，或用虚拟手电筒环顾游戏世界。如你所料，故事有多条探索路线——而且，是的，你会死亡。

paragraphs.en: While the overall experience is timed to feel like an episode of a Netflix series — lasting just under an hour — it's designed to be replayable to explore different narrative branches.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然整体体验被设计成类似一集Netflix剧集的感觉——时长刚好不到一小时——但游戏被设计为可重复游玩，以探索不同的叙事分支。

paragraphs.en: "We looked deeply at the Wii [and] the Nintendo DS," Night School game director Sam Warner told Rolling Stone . "I grew up with those, and I think that focus on novel innovative play was something that we really started this game with. If you've got Netflix and you have a phone, then this is for you."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们深入研究了Wii和任天堂DS，」Night School游戏总监Sam Warner告诉《滚石》，「我是玩着这些长大的，我认为对新奇创新玩法的专注正是我们开始制作这款游戏的初衷。如果你有Netflix和一部手机，这款游戏就是为你准备的。」

paragraphs.en: Unhinged launches on June 30, and will be available to all Netflix subscribers.
paragraphs.cn: 《Unhinged》将于6月30日上线，所有Netflix订阅用户均可游玩。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑，可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
